# Vimium options

unmapAll

## Navigation
map j scrollDown
map <c-e> scrollDown
map k scrollUp
map <c-y> scrollUp
map gg scrollFullPageUp
map G scrollFullPageDown
" default: d
map <c-d> scrollPageDown
" default: u
map <c-u> scrollPageUp
map h scrollLeft
map l scrollRight
map zH scrollToLeft
map zL scrollToRight
map <c-r> reload
map yy copyCurrentUrl
" default: p
map gp openCopiedUrlInCurrentTab
" default: P
map gP openCopiedUrlInNewTab
" Go up the URL hierarchy
map gu goUp
" Go to the root of the current URL hierarchy
map gU goToRoot
map i enterInsertMode
map v enterVisualMode
map V enterVisualLineMode
" Focus the first text input on the page
map gi focusInput
" Open a link in the current tab. Default f
map s LinkHints.activateMode
" Open a link in a new tab. Default F
map S LinkHints.activateModeToOpenInNewTab
map <a-f>  LinkHints.activateModeWithQueue
map yf LinkHints.activateModeToCopyLinkUrl
map [[ goPrevious
map ]] goNext
map gf nextFrame
map gF mainFrame
map m Marks.activateCreateMode
map ` Marks.activateGotoMode

## Using the vomnibar
" Open URL, bookmark or history entry. Default o
map go Vomnibar.activate
" Open URL, bookmark or history entry in a new tab. Default O
map gO Vomnibar.activateInNewTab
" Open a bookmark. Default b
map gb Vomnibar.activateBookmarks
" Open a bookmark in a new tab. Default B
map gB Vomnibar.activateBookmarksInNewTab
" Search through your open tabs. Default T
map T Vomnibar.activateTabSelection
" Edit the current URL
map ge Vomnibar.activateEditUrl
" Edit the current URL and open in a new tab.
map gE Vomnibar.activateEditUrlInNewTab

## Using find
map / enterFindMode
map n performFind
map N performBackwardsFind

## Navigating history
" default H
map J goBack
" default L
map K goForward

## Tabs
map t createTab
" default J
map H previousTab
map gT previousTab
" default K
map L nextTab
map gt nextTab
map ^ visitPreviousTab
map g0 firstTab
map g$ lastTab
map yt duplicateTab
map <a-p> togglePinTab
map <a-m> toggleMuteTab
" Close tab. Default x
map <c-q> removeTab
" Restore tab. Default X
map <c-R> restoreTab
" Move tab to new window. Default W
map <c-W> moveTabToNewWindow
map << moveTabLeft
map >> moveTabRight

# Miscellaneous
map ? showHelp
map gs toggleViewSource
